title: Los tres García
writer: Rogelio A. González, Fernando Méndez, Carlos Orellana
actors: Sara García, Pedro Infante, Abel Salazar
plot: Ruled by a tough grandma (Sara García), the Garcías (Infante, Salazar and Mendoza) are three charro cousins who fall in love with young American-born Lupita (Marga López) and fight for her love until grandma quiets them.
